matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-001 title: register a new user with valid data module: user registration source pages: 2 preconditions: test data: - username: john_doe - password: securepassword - name: john doe - email: johndoe@example.com test steps: 1. user enters valid username, password, name, and email. 2. user clicks on the "register" button. 3. main component verifies the data. 4. users database saves the user data. expected result: user receives a success message indicating registration was successful.

test case id: tc-user-002 title: register a new user with invalid data module: user registration source pages: 2 preconditions: test data: - username: john_doe - password: short - name: john doe - email: johndoe@example.com test steps: 1. user enters an invalid password (less than 8 characters). 2. user clicks on the "register" button. 3. main component verifies the data. 4. users database does not save the user data. expected result: user receives an error message indicating registration failed due to invalid data.

test case id: tc-trip-001 title: create a new trip with valid data module: trip creation source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: a user is logged in. test data: - city: new york - country: usa - begindate: 2023-10-01 - enddate: 2023-10-07 - author: john doe test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user navigates to the trip creation page. 3. user enters valid trip details. 4. user clicks on the "create trip" button. 5. main component creates the trip. 6. main component associates the trip with a plan. 7. main component saves the trip data to the trips database. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the trip was created successfully.

test case id: tc-category-002 title: include a category with invalid data module: trip category management source pages: 1 preconditions: a trip exists. test data: - name: - id: 1 - icon: icon_landmark.png test steps: 1. user navigates to the trip category management page. 2. user selects the trip. 3. user includes invalid category data (empty name). 4. user clicks on the "include category" button. 5. main component attempts to include the category. 6. main component fails to include the category due to invalid data. expected result: user receives an error message indicating the category could not be

test case id: tc-user-003 title: login with valid credentials module: user login source pages: 3 preconditions: a user has been registered. test data: - email: johndoe@example.com - password: securepassword test steps: 1. user enters valid email and password. 2. user clicks on the "login" button. 3. main component sends the credentials to the users database. 4. users database verifies the credentials. 5. users database returns a success message. expected result: user receives a success message indicating login was successful.

test case id: tc-updatetrip-001 title: update trip data with valid data module: trip data update source pages: 4 preconditions: a trip exists. test data: - city: los angeles - country: usa - begindate: 2023-10-05 - enddate: 2023-10-11 - author: john doe test steps: 1. user navigates to the trip data update page. 2. user selects the trip. 3. user enters valid updated trip details. 4. user clicks on the "update trip" button. 5. main component updates the trip data. 6. main component saves the updated trip data to the trips database. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the trip data was updated successfully.

test case id: tc-updatetrip-002 title: update trip data with invalid data module: trip data update source pages: 4 preconditions: a trip exists. test data: - city: - country: usa - begindate: 2023-10-05 - enddate: 2023-10-11 - author: john doe test steps: 1. user navigates to the trip data update page. 2. user selects the trip. 3. user enters invalid city (empty string). 4. user clicks on the "update trip" button. 5. main component attempts to update the trip data. 6. main component fails to update the trip data due to invalid data. expected result: user receives an error message indicating the trip data could not be updated due to invalid data.

test case id: tc-category-001 title: include a category with valid data module: trip category management source pages: 1 preconditions: a trip exists. test data: - name: landmark - id: 1 - icon: icon_landmark.png test steps: 1. user navigates to the trip category management page. 2. user selects the trip. 3. user includes valid category data. 4. user clicks on the "include category" button. 5. main component includes the category in the selected trip. 6. main component saves the category data to the trips database. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the category was included successfully.

test case id: tc-trip-002 title: create a new trip with invalid data module: trip creation source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: a user is logged in. test data: - city: - country: usa - begindate: 2023-10-01 - enddate: 2023-10-07 - author: john doe test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user navigates to the trip creation page. 3. user enters invalid city (empty string). 4. user clicks on the "create trip" button. 5. main component attempts to create the trip. 6. main component fails to create the trip due to invalid data. expected result: user receives an error message indicating the trip could not be created due to invalid data.

test case id: tc-changeuserprofile-001 title: change user profile with valid data module: user profile management source pages: 5 preconditions: a user is logged in. test data: - username: john_doe_new - password: newsecurepassword - name: john doe new - email: johndoenew@example.com test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user navigates to the user profile management page. 3. user enters valid new profile data. 4. user clicks on the "save changes" button. 5. main component retrieves the new data. 6. main component verifies the data. 7. main component updates the user data in the users database. 8. main component returns a success message. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the profile was updated successfully.

test case id: tc-weather-001 title: reference weather with valid data module: daily plan weather reference source pages: 1 preconditions: a daily plan exists. test data: - day: 2023-10-01 - date: 2023-10-01 - weather: sunny test steps: 1. user navigates to the daily plan management page. 2. user selects the daily plan. 3. user references valid weather data. 4. user clicks on the "save weather" button. 5. main component saves the weather data to the dailyplan object. 6. main component saves the weather data to the trips database. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the weather was referenced successfully.

test case id: tc-changeuserprofile-001 title: change user profile with valid data module: user profile management source pages: 5 preconditions: a user is logged in. test data: - username: john_doe_new - password: newsecurepassword - name: john doe new - email: johndoenew@example.com test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user navigates to the user profile management page. 3. user enters valid new profile data. 4. user clicks on the "save changes" button. 5. main component retrieves the new data. 6. main component verifies the data. 7. main component updates the user data in the users database. 8. main component returns a success message. expected result: user receives a success message indicating the profile was updated successfully.
